channel.title: auditd on Sysadmin - Administracja serwerami opartymi o dystrybucje Linux.
channel.description: Recent content in auditd on Sysadmin - Administracja serwerami opartymi o dystrybucje Linux.

item.title: Instalacja i konfiguracja auditd
item.description: Reguły w /etc/audit/rules.d/audit.rules ##################### # This is an example configuration suitable for most systems # Before running with this configuration: # - Remove or comment items which are not applicable # - Check paths of binaries and files ##################### ##################### # Remove any existing rules ###################### -D ##################### # Buffer Size # Might need to be increased, depending on the load of your system. ##################### -b 8192 ##################### # Failure Mode ##################### # 0=Silent # 1=printk, print failure message # 2=panic, halt system -f 1 ##################### # Audit the audit logs.
item.dc:creator: sysadmin
